case_title: VERONICA BAUTISTA ELIZONDO VS. JORGE ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELIZONDO, VERONICA BAUTISTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JORGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-03-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JORGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ELIZONDO, VERONICA BAUTISTA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-29-2013 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO BRING HER OWN INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.
